lora.note: Ported from WindyProLabs/windy-pair-en-pt via download+reupload (cross-org; no native duplicate_repo for models). 930 MB safetensors + tokenizer.

examination_log.rationale: en-pt was identified as the one installer-referenced translation pair missing from WindyWord. Only copy lived in WindyProLabs/windy-pair-en-pt (private, Dr. A era 2026-03-10 upload). WindyWord/translate-en-ROMANCE already covers Portuguese as a Romance target, but dedicated en-pt is better for single-language users. HfApi has move_repo but not duplicate_repo for models; cross-org move_repo requires admin on both orgs which our token doesn't have. Workaround: download via HuggingFaceVeron1 (WindyProLabs scope), upload via WindyWordGodAPI1 (WindyWord scope). Variant published under lora/ subfolder matching WindyWord convention. Future work: build proprietary herm0/ and herm0-scripture/ variants via the normal fine-tune pipeline. Currently lora ≡ base Helsinki weights.

quality_rating.label: standard
quality_rating.note: Pending Grand Rounds v2 certification. Ported from legitimate upstream (Helsinki-NLP/opus-mt-tc-big-en-pt, 34k downloads community-trusted).
